title: capillipedium subrepens var. glaucophyllum
intro: Capillipedium subrepens var. glaucophyllum, also known as the Blue Tuft Grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines and other parts of Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blue Tuft Grass include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Blue Tuft Grass typically involve making tea or infusions from its leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
